title: MSD&E Acceptance
summary: Congratulations to Sumeet and the team in their adventure into the world of material design, in collaboration with the team of Dr. poornima padmanabha at RIT.

title: ICLR 2026 Acceptance
summary: Congratulations to Ruby for her ICLR 2026 work in a novel progressive residual generation approach to improve image generations when learning from data with feature correlations.

title: MICCAI Presentation
summary: Congratulations to Kailong and Yubo for their MICCAI 2025 work on presenting an implicit neural network (INR) for improving unsupervised reconstruction of Positron Emission Tomography (PET) image.

title: MICCAI Poster
summary: Congratulations to Maryam for her MICCAI 2025 work on a novel meta-learning framework for learning patient-specific physics-informed neural networks for cardiac electrophysiology.
